response.global_analysis:
1. Scene Segmentation: Clearly split into an intro dialogue scene and a live musical performance.
2. Song Identification: Manually identified and transcribed Amane Kanata's performance of '波に名前をつけること。僕らの呼吸に終わりがあること。' (Nami ni Namae wo Tsukeru Koto. Bokura no Kokkyuu ni Owari ga Aru Koto.) by Tatsuya Kitani.
3. Audio/Lyrics Discrepancy resolved: Noted that Amane Kanata sang 'もうすぐ桜が咲くんだろう' (Soon, the cherry blossoms will bloom) instead of the original lyrics '燃え尽くす、さあ、夜が明ける' at 03:00.600, and manually transcribed this deviation.
4. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are perfectly anchored to each vocal start, with appropriate segmentation for rapid dialogue in the talk portion.

subtitles.original: あの、スビビの中やんか
subtitles.english: You know, we're Subibi, aren't we?

subtitles.original: そうね
subtitles.english: That's right.

subtitles.original: だから「せーの」って言ったら何言うかわかるよな？
subtitles.english: So if we say "Ready, set...", you know what to say, right?

subtitles.original: わかった
subtitles.english: Got it.

subtitles.original: せーの...
subtitles.english: Ready, set...

subtitles.original: スビビ！最強！
subtitles.english: Subibi! Strongest!

subtitles.original: 待って、待って！
subtitles.english: Wait, wait!

subtitles.original: なんで？
subtitles.english: Why?

subtitles.original: あ、思ってた、思ってた
subtitles.english: Ah, I thought so, I thought so.

subtitles.original: せーの...
subtitles.english: Ready, set...

subtitles.original: スビビ最強！
subtitles.english: Subibi is the strongest!

subtitles.original: ありがとう
subtitles.english: Thank you!

subtitles.original: タッチ、タッチして
subtitles.english: Give me a high-five!

subtitles.original: 大丈夫？届けられる？
subtitles.english: Are you okay? Can you reach?

subtitles.original: ありがとうね、みんな
subtitles.english: Thank you, everyone.

subtitles.original: ありがとう、頑張ってね
subtitles.english: Thank you! Do your best!

subtitles.original: ママ、良かったよ
subtitles.english: Mom, you did great.

subtitles.original: タッチ、タッチ！ありがとう！
subtitles.english: High-five, high-five! Thank you!

subtitles.original: バイバイ！がんばれー！
subtitles.english: Bye-bye! Good luck!

subtitles.original: なんか、うるさかったな
subtitles.english: Man, they were noisy.

subtitles.original: 頑張るか。よし
subtitles.english: Alright, let's do this.

subtitles.original: くだらない愛の結果で 僕らは生まれ落ちて
subtitles.english: By the result of a trivial love, we were born into this world,

subtitles.original: 呼吸さえしあぐねているけれど
subtitles.english: struggling even just to breathe.

subtitles.original: 綺麗な言葉並べて 醜さに蓋をして
subtitles.english: Lining up pretty words, covering up the ugliness,

subtitles.original: 自分を愛せないままだな、ずっと
subtitles.english: I still can't love myself, even now, always...

subtitles.original: くだらない嘘を言う度 青い色こぼれ落ちた
subtitles.english: Every time I told a trivial lie, a blue color spilled out.

subtitles.original: ガラスの瞳が綺麗で
subtitles.english: Your glass eyes were so beautiful.

subtitles.original: 君のその瞼のように 優しい人になってさ
subtitles.english: I want to become a kind person, just like your eyelids,

subtitles.original: そんな僕を愛したいんだよ
subtitles.english: and love myself like that.

subtitles.original: 私の呼吸に終わりがあること
subtitles.english: My breath will eventually come to an end,

subtitles.original: 君の声を覚えている
subtitles.english: but I will still remember your voice.

subtitles.original: 生まれては消えていくこと それだけを繰り返している
subtitles.english: Being born and then fading away, we repeat only that.

subtitles.original: 僕らがもしまた会えたらだなんて思ってた
subtitles.english: I kept thinking, "What if we could meet again?"

subtitles.original: 生まれては消えていく日々の 青白い波に名前をつけることに
subtitles.english: To give a name to the pale blue waves of these days that are born and fade,

subtitles.original: 意味はなかったのかな、なんてさ
subtitles.english: I wondered if there was no meaning to it at all...

subtitles.original: たわいない忙しさみたい 積み木で遊んでいる
subtitles.english: Like a silly busyness, playing with building blocks,

subtitles.original: 崩れるその日を待っている
subtitles.english: waiting for the day they collapse.

subtitles.original: 澄みきった夜 of 静寂は 君の頬の赤色で
subtitles.english: The clear silence of the night, colored by the red of your cheeks,

subtitles.original: もうすぐ桜が咲くんだろう
subtitles.english: soon the cherry blossoms will bloom.

subtitles.original: 僕らの呼吸に意味がなくても
subtitles.english: Even if there is no meaning to our breathing,

subtitles.original: 二人はまた恋をする
subtitles.english: the two of us will fall in love again.

subtitles.original: 生まれては消えていくこと それだけを繰り返している
subtitles.english: Being born and then fading away, we repeat only that.

subtitles.original: そして君も夜の海に帰っていくんだろう
subtitles.english: And you, too, will return to the night sea.

subtitles.original: 生まれては消えていく日々の 青白い波に名前をつけることに
subtitles.english: To give a name to the pale blue waves of these days that are born and fade,

subtitles.original: 囚われている
subtitles.english: we are trapped.

subtitles.original: 覚えているかな
subtitles.english: Do you remember...

subtitles.original: いつかの春の朝に
subtitles.english: ...on some spring morning...

subtitles.original: 桜の木の下で
subtitles.english: ...under the cherry blossom tree,

subtitles.original: 約束したこと
subtitles.english: the promise we made?

subtitles.original: 思い出も君の名前も いつの日か失ってしまって
subtitles.english: My memories and even your name, someday they will be lost,

subtitles.original: 僕もいつかこの海と一つになるんだろう
subtitles.english: and I, too, will someday become one with this sea.

subtitles.original: 君のいない冬の空気が 僕の頬を刺すその痛みさえ
subtitles.english: Even the pain of the winter air without you piercing my cheek,

subtitles.original: 愛していたい
subtitles.english: I want to love it.

subtitles.original: 生まれては消えていくこと それだけを繰り返している
subtitles.english: Being born and then fading away, we repeat only that.

subtitles.original: 僕らがもしまた会えたらだなんて思ってた
subtitles.english: I kept thinking, "What if we could meet again?"

subtitles.original: 生まれては消えていく日々の 青白い波に名前をつけることに
subtitles.english: To give a name to the pale blue waves of these days that are born and fade,

subtitles.original: 意味はなかったのかな、なんてさ
subtitles.english: I wondered if there was no meaning to it at all...

subtitles.original: こうして冬が終わって
subtitles.english: And so, winter comes to an end,

subtitles.original: 青い春が来る
subtitles.english: and blue spring arrives.
